title: heterotheca microcephala
intro: Heterotheca microcephala, also known as the small-headed yellowtop, is a flowering plant species native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiviral properties. Heterotheca microcephala is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
